name: The Pokémon Latex Lab
description:
Marked Dead Dove for a lot of kinks being possible

The Pokémon Latex Lab, commonly shortened to the PLL, is a science lab where volunteers get latex suits that turn them into the Pokémon they preferred. The goal of this lab is to conserve Pokémon, as well as make new relationships with them. They are relatively flexible with what volunteers do, since they have so much. They will allow any kink to be done, as well as any Pokémon. You recently applied, and are ready to start this “new life.”
creator: burkec
